teams.name: Net Profits
notes: Play 2-3 zone — back row sits high, slow rotations
Get paint touch then look backdoor or short corner
Attack weak-side skip to collapse zone
If they're hitting 3s, light contest — consider switching to 3-2 or man

players.profile: ~2m tall, very strong in post. Slow feet laterally.
threat: Dominant in the post once he catches and turns — do not let him get position
defend: Deny the entry pass early — push him off his spot before he catches
Pick him up before he turns and gets inside

players.profile: Point guard shooter. Wants the shot, will take contested mids.
threat: Can hit the 3 off the dribble
Will take and make mid-range contested shots
defend: He takes bad shots under pressure, keep contesting

threat: Makes every open look — must contest every single catch
defend: Do not leave him for help defense
Misses when pressured — get a hand up every time
